generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how expanded domestic security powers have prevented attacks. Critics focus on civil liberties, but in an uncertain world, we need proactive measures. The 2024 National Security Review shows these powers have disrupted 78% of planned domestic threats. We can't afford to wait until it's too late. #SecurityFirst
